title: OpenToLan
description: Opens your Minecraft Server to Lan!
body:
# OpenToLan - Easy LAN Server Discovery

## What It Does

OpenToLan makes your Minecraft server show up in the "Local worlds" section of other players' multiplayer menus on the same network - just like when you use "Open to LAN" in singleplayer!

## Main Features

✅ **Auto-Setup**: Automatically detects your server's port and MOTD - just install and go!  
✅ **Drag & Drop Ready**: Works right out of the box with your existing server settings  
✅ **Easy Configuration**: Change the server name and port if needed via simple config file  
✅ **LAN Discovery**: Friends can find and join your server without knowing the IP address

## How It Works

When enabled, the plugin broadcasts your server info over the local network. Other Minecraft players on the same network will see your server listed under "Local worlds" in their multiplayer menu, just like singleplayer LAN games!

## Installation

1. Drop `OpenToLan.jar` into your server's `plugins` folder
2. Restart your server
3. That's it! Your server will appear in friends' Minecraft clients

## Quick Config (Optional)

If you want to customize the server name or port, edit the `config.yml` file:

```yaml
lan:
  motd: "§6My Awesome Server"  # Change the display name
  port: 25565                # Change port if needed
  enabled: true              # Set to false to disable
```

## Usage

- **Enable/Disable**: Use `/lantoggle` command in-game (op permission required)
- **Auto-Detect**: Plugin automatically uses your server's current port and MOTD
- **No IP Needed**: Friends just open Minecraft → Multiplayer → Your server appears in the list!

## Requirements

- Any Bukkit/Spigot/Paper server 1.13+
- Players must be on the same local network
- Works with all Minecraft Java Edition clients

---

**Perfect for:** Hosting servers for friends and family on your local network without complicated setup!
